deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, profit $42-62K. Close date May 1 2026. CMA shows $266K estimated value.
deals.next: Feed MLS data to Sirhc for branded analysis sheet. Build template for future deals.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing terminated. Chris walking away. Signs picked up last week. Development angle with Isaac Linares did not move forward. Sisters and Isaac did not reach agreement.

logs.m: Listing canceled. Walking away from this deal. Signs picked up from property last week.
Updated sisters on showing. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development, ~$150K offer contingent on his project.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back into property. Plan to make updates and repairs, then relist. Underwater ~$93-143K. Chandler was laid off May 22. Relationship intact.
deals.next: Termination release signatures obtained. Follow up when ready to relist.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Matt and Chandler moving back in. Plan to make updates and repairs, then relist when timing is right.
Call completed. Chandler laid off - strong hardship documentation available. Leaning toward short sale path but not moving forward at this time.
Where Things Stand email sent with full market analysis and three path options. Market value $350-400K vs payoff $493K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed $259,900 May 14. Hairline foundation crack noted. Sellers relocating to NC second week of June. Second-look buyers are hottest lead. Roof claim approved by adjuster.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers. Monitor for backup offers.

logs.m: Second-look buyers favorite property. Pre-inspection report offered. Rescheduled showing to May 30. Confirmed roof claim moving forward.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30 PM.
MLS live. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback received - cultural concern about street direction. Pre-inspection report sent to agent.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG Photography - 43 photos and floorplans.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K. CMA recommends $295K list price. Thin market - only 3 comps in 10 miles. Divorce situation - motivated to sell. Colton may work on 181 CR 7751 project.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. RPR report pulled. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026.
Prior clients from VA renovation loan. Going through divorce, need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank REO. Cleanup ongoing by HouzzPro (Matt Toney). Floor demo complete, drywall cut and on site. Police reports stalled. Utilities: Medina Electric + EMCSUD.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric (866-632-3532) for meter status. Call EMCSUD (830-709-3879) for water service. Replace camera batteries. Get listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

logs.m: Drywall crew actively patching holes. Sent photos to Kelly. Police reports still pending. Utility response pending.
Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut for electrician and plumber, new drywall on site. Utility providers confirmed.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney/San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Under contract with Espinoza buyers at $113K. Waiting on EMD and signed TXR 1903 amendment from buyer agent Javier. Chicago Title escrow opened with Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email domain (tmail vs gmail).

logs.m: New buyers: Espinoza family, buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent for price update. Another agent called with backup buyers.
Steve signed amendment. TXR 1404 uploaded. MLS updated to $117,500. Exclusions locked in.
Clearing complete. Photos sent for social media. First offer stalled - Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU, no earnest money received.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152K. Closed and funded Apr 27 2026. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature. Chicago Title handled escrow.
deals.next: Joy gift delivery (basket, rug, trolley). Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Send thank you basket to Michael (notary) and UPS Store staff. Confirm commission received.

logs.m: Transaction officially closed and funded. Lien release signed and delivered Apr 21.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Released to Chicago Title same day.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo - family member willing to work with us on lien resolution.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold - need to move fast. No HOA firm requirement. Pivoting to new construction. Connected with Isaac Linares on 301 W Saxet wholesale deal, Corpus Christi at $85K. FHA 203k financing angle. Zach Schaphorst pre-approval ~$122K. New construction search on hold pending this deal.
leads.next: Follow up with Zach on 203k feasibility. Follow up after Isaac phone call with Mike. Loop in Josh LT. If Saxet falls through, revisit new construction search.

logs.m: Isaac brought 301 W Saxet wholesale deal. Mike connected with Isaac directly. Zach sent property info for 203k evaluation.
Call with Mike and Chandler - hardship situation discussed. Leaning toward short sale approach but exploring options.
Rental selling, need to move. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, pass. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Brandon referring his mom (Milagros Stringer) as new construction buyer. Also coordinating 8527 Green Bliss rental setup via uncle Jimbo. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment. Not locked to one builder.
leads.next: Confirm Grace Gardens visit timing with Brandon and mom. Register as buyer agent before first builder visit to Carlos McLean (210-605-0241). Get mom financial details: budget, preapproval, down payment.

logs.m: Jimbo backed out of rental - Chris sent $500. Buyer rep sent to Milagros not yet signed. Builder outreach template drafted.
Buyer rep agreement signed with Milagros. MI Homes option from Frank under review - keeps payments under $1200/mo.
Met with Brandon in person. Rental listing opportunity for uncle Jimbo. Mom (Milagros) new construction buyer.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief healing story through plants. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential via trust-based, long-term relationship. Facebook and Instagram story angle.
leads.next: Follow up with Sallie Mae personally. Ask permission to share her story for content. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Connected through garden community. Grief to healing to plants story. Needs follow-up.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Has property 13810 Tangle Tree St plans to sell soon. Already working with realtor, not currently available. Property 90% complete, having trouble finishing. Open to selling as-is. Opportunity: pre-market buyer or help if current relationship doesn't work out.
leads.next: Follow up - check in on how finishing work is going. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay connected through garden community.

logs.m: Met at garden event. 13810 Tangle Tree St. Currently with another agent, open to selling as-is.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor directly behind her may have passed away. Son now owns the house. Deceased was avid gardener. Probate/inherited property opportunity. Son has not been contacted. Community connection through Miss Pat is warm intro.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son's name and contact. Reach out to son - introduce as neighbor and gardener first. Assess if keeping, renting, or selling.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor property. Son inherited. Avid gardener deceased. Sensitive situation - do not rush.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Bryce is dumpster contractor on project. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting in San Antonio area. Looking to purchase a home.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info - he is on site at 181 CR regularly. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Follow up next time Chris on site.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property needing work - unique situation. Details pending. Caught up May 11.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property they want. Understand financing and work scope. Identify matching inventory.

logs.m: Jerome has buyer needing fixer property. Unique situation. Details pending.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran's mom. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment (P+I). Not locked to Grace Gardens. Builder rate buydowns are the angle. Buyer rep signed May 7 2026.
leads.next: Confirm Grace Gardens visit timing. Register as buyer agent at first builder visit. Get financial confirmation: pre-approval status, down payment, budget range.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent to Milagros - not yet signed. MI Homes option under review. Builder outreach in progress.
Buyer rep agreement signed with Milagros Stringer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment.

Send closing cost analysis if they move forward

priorities.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Must register Chris as buyer agent BEFORE first builder visit. Call Carlos McLean (210-605-0241) at Grace Gardens to confirm visit timing. Get Milagros preapproval status and financial details confirmed.
